chapter.label: Tale 59
chapter.title: The Lfe Of Abba Thalhlaios The Cilician

paragraphs.text: Abba Peter, priest of the same lavra, told us that Abba Thalilaios the Cilician spent sixty years in the monastic life and never once stopped weeping. He would always say: ‘God gave us this time for repentance; it is indeed for Him that we must seek’.
